vote.text: Amendment SA 5821 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 5821 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Grassley. To change the effective dates.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5821 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Grassley.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 5821 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
